heading: Advisory board
label: 4046 Advisory board
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “FACA” in heading and “chapter 10 of title 5.” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act.” in text.Pub. L. 117–2861996—Subsec. (d). substituted “advisory board” for “Advisory Board”.Pub. L. 104–109

F, title I, § 133117 Stat. 243Feb. 20, 2003“Within 90 days of enactment of this Act [] the Special Trustee for American Indians, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior and the Tribes, shall appoint new members to the Special Trustee Advisory Board.”Feb. 20, 2003
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “FACA” in heading and “chapter 10 of title 5.” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act.” in text.Pub. L. 117–2861996—Subsec. (d). substituted “advisory board” for “Advisory Board”.Pub. L. 104–109

Appointment of New Members, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–7, div. F, title I, § 133117 Stat. 243Feb. 20, 2003“Within 90 days of enactment of this Act [] the Special Trustee for American Indians, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior and the Tribes, shall appoint new members to the Special Trustee Advisory Board.”Feb. 20, 2003

children.text: five members shall represent trust fund account holders, including both tribal and Individual Indian Money accounts;
two members shall have practical experience in trust fund and financial management;
one member shall have practical experience in fiduciary investment management; and
one member, from academia, shall have knowledge of general management of large organizations.

children.heading: Term
children.label: b Term
children.text: Each member shall serve a term of two years.

children.heading: Chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: c Chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: The advisory board shall not be subject to chapter 10 of title 5.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: d Termination
children.text: The advisory board shall terminate upon termination of the Office of Special Trustee.
